creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Attempting to run firefox-128.0.2,2 [0] on a -CURRENT [1] system fails with this error:

XPCOMGlueLoad error for file /usr/local/lib/firefox/libxul.so:
/usr/local/lib/firefox/libxul.so: Undefined symbol "__strlcpy_chk@FBSD_1.8"
Couldn't load XPCOM.

Please let me know if there is more information I can provide or anything I can test.

[0]
% pkg info firefox-128.0.2,2
firefox-128.0.2,2
Name           : firefox
Version        : 128.0.2,2
Installed on   : Wed Jul 24 00:33:58 2024 ADT
Origin         : www/firefox
Architecture   : FreeBSD:15:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : www wayland
Licenses       :
Maintainer     : gecko@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://www.mozilla.com/firefox
Comment        : Web browser based on the browser portion of Mozilla
Options        :
        ALSA           : off
        CANBERRA       : off
        DBUS           : on
        DEBUG          : off
        FFMPEG         : on
        JACK           : off
        LIBPROXY       : off
        LTO            : off
        OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS: on
        PROFILE        : on
        PULSEAUDIO     : off
        SNDIO          : off
        TEST           : off

[1]
% uname -a
FreeBSD phe.ftfl.ca 15.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #1 main-n270696-6c5ee6e55a35: Mon Jun 10 13:07:56 ADT 2024     root@phe.ftfl.ca:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG amd64
